THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. THE PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. THE CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. THE SETTLEMENT TERMS ARE AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT OWES $2,550.00 BACK RENT FOR AUG THRU OCT 2004 AT THE RATE OF $850.00 PER MONTH, PLUS $334.00 COSTS FOR A TOTAL OF $2,884.00. DEFENDANT WILL PAY NOVEMBER RENT ON NOV 15, 2004 WITH NO GRACE PERIOD
